title: lippia pseudothea
intro: Lippia pseudothea, also known as Mexican citronella, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae, native to Mexico. The medicinal properties of Lippia pseudothea include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lippia pseudothea include tea, essential oil, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
